race.description: Christmas In July @ Grc Sat 18 July 2027 F&M Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: MURPHILLY (2) struck trouble shortly after the start and got further back than anticipated before running on late with a respectable fourth over 1600m at Newcastle. Has a good record on her home track and don't dismiss. BAKERLOO (5) placed at this trip and strips fitter third-up. Slow into stride and never got into the race with a poor ninth over 1400m at Newcastle. Open to improvement and adept in all conditions. SWEET BUBBLES (11) consistent mare resuming. Back without a trial and must be respected with leading apprentice going on from the good draw. Keep safe. DIAMOND MODEL (3) just under a month between runs when she knocked up late to run fourth over 1450m at Illawarra Grange. Proven at this trip and has the speed to get over from the wide gate. Stays in the mix.
